vespa 0.4.0
  • Reference

    • Signed Distance Function
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

advancing_front_reconstruction()
Reconstruct a surface from a point cloud (Advancing Front)
alpha_wrapping()
Generate a watertight mesh via alpha wrapping
boolean_operation()
Boolean operation on two triangular surface meshes
delaunay2()
2D Delaunay triangulation of a planar point set
extract_isosurface()
Extract an isosurface from a 3-D scalar field
isotropic_remeshing()
Isotropic remeshing of a triangular surface mesh
mesh_check()
Validate and optionally repair a triangular surface mesh
mesh_deformation()
Deform a triangular surface mesh
mesh_smoothing()
Smooth a triangular surface mesh
mesh_subdivision()
Subdivide a triangular surface mesh
patch_filling()
Fill holes in a triangular surface mesh
pca_estimate_normals()
Estimate point cloud normals via PCA
poisson_reconstruction()
Reconstruct a surface from an oriented point cloud (Poisson)
read_points_xyz()
Read a point cloud file
read_stl()
Read a surface mesh from an STL file
read_vtp()
Read a surface mesh or point cloud from a VTP file
region_fairing()
Fair a region of a triangular surface mesh
sdf_volume sdf_volume-class
SDF volume objects
shape_smoothing()
Shape-preserving smoothing of a triangular surface mesh
signed_distance_function()
Compute a signed distance function (SDF) volume from a surface mesh

Developed by Christophe Regouby.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
